title: Genomics and adaptation in forest ecosystems.
author: Neophytou C Heer K Milesi P Peter M Pyhajarvi T Westergren M Rellstab C Gugerli F
content: S-EPMC8828617 PMC8828617 Genomics and adaptation in forest ecosystems. Rapid human-induced environmental changes like climate warming represent a challenge for forest ecosystems.
